hero.titleLine2: for the way you actually think.
hero.subtitle: Aurelia is a calm place to write, reason, and read. Built around your conversation, not the model behind it.
hero.placeholder: Try: outline an essay on attention as a moral skill

capabilities.title: The product is the writing.
capabilities.body: Three things Aurelia does better than its alternatives. Everything else is calm chrome around them.

writing.title: Writing that thinks with you
writing.body: Outlines, edits, and long-form drafts in a single thread. Aurelia reads what you wrote before, and respects it.

research.title: Research with sources
research.body: Deep research mode runs a small panel of sources, surfaces citations as inline chips, and lets you trace any claim.

code.title: Code that doesn't shout
code.body: Refined syntax, copy-to-clipboard, language tags. Reads like a journal article, not a terminal.

how.title: Premium by subtraction.
how.body: We removed the bubble. We removed the loading spinner. We removed the cold blue accent. What's left is a place that takes thinking seriously — and respects yours.

noDefaults.title: No defaults left intact
noDefaults.body: Every component was rebuilt from tokens so the product feels of-a-piece.

readingFirst.title: Reading first
readingFirst.body: Generous line height, restrained color, single accent. Made to be lived in.

youOwnIt.title: You own the conversation
youOwnIt.body: Edit anything, regenerate, branch, export. Your archive is yours.

how.quote: It feels less like talking to a tool and more like writing in a quiet room with someone who has been reading the same things you have.

useCases.title: Four ways people are using it.

models.title: Every frontier model. One calm studio.
models.body: Claude, GPT, Gemini, Llama, Mistral, Qwen, DeepSeek, Grok — the models the field actually runs on, gathered behind one unhurried interface.

proof.switch: Switch models mid-conversation; the thread stays whole.
proof.strength: Reach for each model's strength without leaving the page.
proof.oneSub: One subscription — no keys to juggle, no tabs to chase.

safety.title: Your conversations are yours.
safety.body: Aurelia does not train on your conversations by default. Memory is editable and exportable. Workspaces can be enterprise-isolated with custom retention rules.

noTraining.title: No training on your chats
noTraining.body: You opt in, not out. Off by default for everyone.

export.title: Export anything
export.body: Your archive is yours. Markdown, JSON, plain text.

memory.title: Editable memory
memory.body: Every fact Aurelia learns is a row you can edit or delete.

cta.title: Open the workspace.
cta.body: A quiet place to write, reason, and read. Free to try. Yours, after.

footer.tagline: A thoughtful AI companion. Made for thinking, not for shouting.

preview.essayLead: Here's a working outline for a 2,000-word essay on {{topic}}. I've kept the structure spacious so each section can breathe.
preview.section1Italic: the case for taking attention seriously
preview.section1Body: A small particular image, then a thesis sentence.

membership.title: Find the tier that fits.
membership.body: Every plan opens the full studio — every frontier model, deep research, the sandbox. Higher tiers simply give you more room to think: more credits, more projects, more knowledge bases.
membership.footnote: Prices shown per cycle. Cancel anytime — your archive is always yours.

demo.user1: Outline an essay on attention as a moral skill.
demo.reply1: Here's a spacious outline — each section has room to breathe, and the thesis lands before the evidence.
demo.cite1: On the moral dimension of attention
demo.user2: Tighten the opening to two sentences.
demo.reply2: Attention is not passive. What we choose to notice is already a moral act.
